title: ophrys igiliae
side_effects: Ophrys igiliae can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive problems. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its volatile oils may lead to headaches and dizziness. Overuse of the plant's extracts can also interfere with blood clotting, increasing the risk of bruising and bleeding. Additionally, improper handling of the plant may cause anaphylaxis in individuals with severe allergies.
